description_for_human: Find the best tools for your AI agent — 15,400+ MCP servers, APIs, and CLIs scored for agent readiness.
description_for_model: Search and discover AI agent tools. Use this to find MCP servers, APIs, CLI tools, and skills. Supports intent-based search (describe what you want to do) and keyword search. Returns tools with Clarvia scores (0-100) indicating agent readiness.
